name: /standards-monitor records each iteration to a monitor.log with a started_at timestamp
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro standards && printf 'sources: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --log standards/monitor.log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'started_at=2026-05-13T00:00:00Z' standards/monitor.log && echo ok 1>&2
